metadata.description: Deterministic, gate-backed spec-driven orchestration with the spin CLI — the spine never calls a model. 65 agents, 24 KB domains, 33 commands, 9 gates, model routing.

plugins.name: spindle
plugins.description: Deterministic spec-driven orchestration for Claude Code. The spin CLI is the spine (it never calls a model); slash commands orchestrate Claude around CLI-enforced gates. 65 agents, 24 KB domains, 33 commands, model routing (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), adversarial verification.
